'''Jenks''' was a [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="FreeComic" /> They were created on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] from the [[Clone template/Legends|clone template]] of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. As a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of Fett, Jenks stood at 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall and had [[Color/Legends|tan]] skin.<ref name="Clone Databank" /> [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Jenks wore [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase II clone trooper armor]] with yellow markings.<ref name="FreeComic" />

During the war, Jenks was aboard a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] gunship with [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], when it crashed on a mission to locate [[Grievous/Legends|General Grievous]] and [[Dooku/Legends|Count Dooku's]] hideout on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ruhe]]. When Jenks told the Jedi that the repairs to the ship may take days, Obi-Wan and Anakin took two [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] and went out to find Dooku's fortress on [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]], leaving Jenks behind to make repairs. The Jedi were soon ambushed by [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], who destroyed their bikes and killed the two clones. Continuing to the hideout on foot, the Jedi arrived to find themselves surrounded by battle droids. Fighting their way to the roof, they were forced to the edge, which caused Obi-Wan to fall off, only to be caught by Jenks and the repaired gunship.<ref name="FreeComic" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jenks appeared in the [[Free Comic Book Day 2005 Special]], a one-shot [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] by [[Miles Lane]].<ref name="FreeComic" />
